data.body: Implemented in worktree incident-2731-followups, commit 12178732d: SITE_SUBDIRS single-sourced list + volume_for_subdir helper (hyphen->underscore derivation) + reviewbot-tickets entry. Verified: bash -n, --print-volumes lists all 9 volumes incl gerrit_reviewbot_tickets, stub-canary run proves no side effects. Stacked change headed to Gerrit refs/for/main pending independent subagent approval + CI.
